title: AgentOutput
description: Standard output schema all agents must return. Deviating from this schema breaks orchestration.

status.description: Terminal state of this agent's execution.

result.description: Agent-specific output payload. Schema varies by agent — see individual agent definitions.

errors.description: List of error objects if status is failure or needs_review.

retryable.description: Whether the orchestrator should retry this agent

next_actions.description: Suggested next steps for the orchestrator.
